name: Fake Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large microwavable bowl.
2. Microwave on high until the butter melts.
3. Use an electric mixer to beat the mixture until smooth.
4. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla extract and any additional flavorings (e.g., walnuts).
5. Pour the mixture into a greased pan.
6. Allow the fudge to chill until firm before serving.
